article_meta.title: SCOTUS Pro-Life Center Takes Its Fight Against Democrat Lawfare To The Supreme Court By: Shawn Fleetwood November 21, 20

reasoning: Mixed performance: it correctly flags several biased phrases in the author’s prose (e.g., 'Democrat lawfare', 'seemingly political inquiry') and identifies slant, but commits an attribution violation by flagging a source’s quoted characterization ('overtly hostile...'). It also misses a couple of clear author-level instances and includes a somewhat debatable 'Bias by Omission' item.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: One clear violation: it flags 'overtly hostile to the mission of pregnancy centers,' which is attributed to Wilson, not the author.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most items are defensible; one clear false positive (quoted text) and one debatable 'Bias by Omission' claim.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed at least 1–2 clear author-level instances such as 'gearing up to fight back' and the subjective descriptor 'candid mother.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels for the valid items are mostly appropriate (Word Choice, Subjective Adjectives, Slant). The 'Bias by Omission' label is debatable; the misattributed 'Mind Reading' would be correct if it were the author’s voice but it isn’t.
